description: Folding Travel Umbrella, 6 Ribs Mini Folding Umbrella with Capsule Case, Portable UV Umbrella, Small UV Umbrella, Windproof Small Compact Umbrella for Men Women 【Features】 1. The black heat shield coating process on the inside cuts the sun's rays, which are heat rays, because it is 100% completely shielded, so you can stay cool even in hot sunlight 2. This folding umbrella is suitable for different weather in four seasons such as rainy days, windy days, snowy days or sunny days. It can block the sun heat and harmful ultraviolet rays. It can protect you from sun, rain, wind or snow in bad weather or sunny day 3. Our umbrellas can be used in both rain and sunny days.
